source.name: Houston event source registry
source.attribution: Official source pages and configured public event feeds

events.title: Bank of America Museums on Us®
events.description: Bank of America invites cardholders to receive free general admission to more than 225 cultural institutions in dozens of cities across the US, including Children's Museum Houston!

events.title: Color Splash Playdate Tuesdays
events.description: Join us for a vibrant journey into the world of colors! A hands-on, sensory-rich experience designed especially for the little ones! Dates/times vary. Click for details!

events.title: EastArts Workshop Series 1: Japanese Stencil Dyeing - Ise Katagami
events.description: Join us for EastArts, a vibrant workshop series that immerses kids in the captivating traditions and creative expressions of East Asian arts and craft techniques! Dates and times vary!

events.title: EastArts Workshop Series 2: Planet Earth Scrap Sticker Lab
events.description: Join us for EastArts, a vibrant workshop series that immerses kids in the captivating traditions and creative expressions of East Asian arts and craft techniques! Dates and times vary!

events.title: In the Community: Basics Houston Fun*Shops
events.description: Dive headfirst into the captivating world of early childhood development, where each moment spent engaging with your baby becomes a masterpiece of neurological brilliance. Dates/Times vary!

events.title: Kaleidoscope Colloquiums
events.description: Discover our newest exhibit, Faithful Friends, with fun and engaging programming that inspire children to ask questions and learn about the diverse world of faith, beliefs, culture, and friendship!

events.title: Party All Summer Long!
events.description: Get ready to Party All Summer Long at Children’s Museum Houston, where every week brings a brand-new way to celebrate, explore, and have a blast!

events.title: STEM Bites for Little Learners
events.description: Get ready for some hands-on science fun with planting daisy seeds while understanding how living things grow! Dates/ time vary. Click for details!

events.title: Animal Tales

events.title: Zumbini Fridays
events.description: Created by Zumba, get ready for some original music and movement to promote all your toddlers' developmental skills! Dates and times vary. Click for details!

events.title: Blood Drive
events.description: from The Houston Arboretum is partnering with the Gulf Coast Regional Blood Center to host regular blood drives at the Arboretum. Click a date below to sign up to donate blood. All types of blood are needed to support the needs of our city. All successful donors will receive a voucher for a free Arboretum Individual Membership! 2026 january 3 february 7 Marc

events.title: Fourth Saturday Phenology Walk
events.description: from Fourth Saturday of the Month 9:00 – 11:00 am Free, donations appreciated All ages, minors must be accompanied by an adult Meet in front of the Nature Center building Discover the hidden seasonal rhythms of nature firsthand on our guided Phenology Walks, where we track the life cycles of different plants across ecosystems, from the first spring bud burst

events.title: Gardening for Bees
events.description: from $22 member / $37 nonmember Ages 12+, minors must be accompanied by an adult Set the table for bees in your garden! Learn all about the best native plants for bees, techniques to help bees survive the extremes of summer and winter, and how to provide nesting space for these critical pollinators. Please dress for the weather and wear walking shoes. regist

events.title: Rewind & Play: Soccer Edition!
events.description: Rewind & Play is the Children’s Museum Houston’s signature adults‑only night—where growing up takes a backseat and play takes over!

events.title: You Got a Friend in Me Party!
events.description: Enjoy a toy-tastic day with Woody, Buzz, and Jessie featuring meet-and-greets, alien plushies, musical adventures, Buzz wings, fizzy rockets, and hands-on fun for the whole family and beyond!

events.title: Final Kickoff Soccer Party
events.description: Before the summer celebration takes its final bow, families can enjoy one last victory lap when the Museum stays open until 8 p.m. for extended evening fun!

events.title: Kidpendence Day Party!

events.title: Freedom Over Texas
events.description: City of Houston's official July 4th celebration honoring Independence Day and the nation's 250th anniversary, with live music, a Kids Zone, food zones, and a fireworks finale over Buffalo Bayou.
